author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more high-impact Tier-3s (iommufd HWPT + KVM memslots):

- drivers/iommu/iommufd-hwpt.md: covers iommufd/hw_pagetable.c (~550 lines) — HWPT (Hardware Page Table) object: HWPT-PAGING (standard backed by IOAS) + HWPT-NESTED (guest IOMMU virtualization with parent-paging-HWPT providing L2 + per-vendor user-supplied data_uptr for L1 e.g., IOMMU_HWPT_DATA_VTD_S1/_ARM_SMMUV3/_AMD_V2), per-vendor iommu_ops->domain_alloc_paging/_alloc_nested dispatch, IOMMU_HWPT_INVALIDATE selective TLB invalidate via per-IOMMU QI batch, IOMMU_HWPT_SET_DIRTY_TRACKING + IOMMU_HWPT_GET_DIRTY_BITMAP (Intel SLADE / AMD HWDirty / sw-tracked-via-write-protect), IOMMU_HWPT_REPLACE atomic device-HWPT swap for live-migration handoff, per-HWPT attached-device list under attach_lock, HWPT destroy refused while attached. 10 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + data_uptr-validated + replace-atomicity + dirty-bitmap-OOB) / Layer-2 ref to nested_invalidate.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus IOAS↔HWPT↔device round-trip.
- virt/kvm/memslots.md: covers memslot subset of virt/kvm/kvm_main.c (~1500 lines) — KVM memory slots (every guest page-fault path + every dirty-tracking call): per-VM kvm_memslots array (per-as_id; x86 has 2: SMM + non-SMM) RCU-swapped on KVM_SET_USER_MEMORY_REGION[2], per-slot kvm_memory_slot with base_gfn + npages + userspace_addr (hva) + dirty_bitmap + flags + guest_memfd backing for SEV-SNP/TDX private memory, hva_tree + gfn_tree rb-trees for fast lookup, LRU-cached slot index, per-VM gfn_to_memslot via binary-search on sorted gpa, per-slot gfn_to_hva + gfn_to_pfn (atomic / non-atomic / async / write_fault variants), KVM_GET_DIRTY_LOG + _CLEAR_DIRTY_LOG + _GET_DIRTY_LOG_PROTECT (atomic read-and-clear + write-protect), per-vCPU dirty-ring via KVM_CAP_DIRTY_LOG_RING_ACQ_REL with acq-rel producer/consumer ordering, per-arch prepare/commit/flush_shadow hooks. 10 REQ / 8 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + slot-overflow + slot-id-OOB + bitmap-OOB) / Layer-2 ref to dirty_ring.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus install↔gfn-translate round-trip.

Total state: 270 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 36 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set (36): + iommufd-hwpt + kvm-memslots.

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-iommu-iommufd-hwpt, design-virt-kvm-memslots.

Next iter plan: kernel/sched/cfs.md status check (already exists, may need expansion) — pivot to fs/vfs/path-resolution.md if dense (path-walk + LOOKUP/follow_link/security_inode_permission — every open() goes through here) + drivers/usb/host-ehci.md (legacy USB-2 EHCI host controller — still in use on older HW).
